She goes into homes across the UK to clean for vulnerable people in need, but what she’s seeing behind closed doors is deeply disturbing. Now she’s calling for change.

Bea Elton has launched a petition for an animal abuse register after witnessing severe neglect through her work, and it’s already gained huge public support.

Read more at the link in bio.

latestPosts.caption:
RENTERS RISE UP! 🗣️💥 

For too long we have been forced to choose between our homes and our pets- leading to thousands of animals being surrendered to shelters like @battersea 

Not anymore.

The Renter’s Rights Act is officially here and it’s a game changer for renters and their pets! We have more rights than ever before!! @mhclg 
#landlord #renting #pets #adoptdontshop #uk
The UK is failing animals. Anyone convicted should NEVER be allowed access to get more animals. It’s that simple. If you agree, sign the petition. #animalwelfare #uk #dogs #animallover #pets
2026 so far!!!🥺❤️ Feeling very grateful and very blessed!! Launching the government petition against animal abusers has been very hectic-  but we’re now back to regular free clean postings!

This free clean made me so angry. We are failing so many animals and will continue to do so unless we make a change. Please sign the petition and help me make a change ❤️🐾 #cleaning #animallover #pets #animalwelfare #dogs
